name: Stand up compose core (Postgres + Directus)
description: Bring up the base Docker compose stack with Postgres and a healthy Directus instance, bootstrapping an admin token. Showcase task — all data synthetic.

name: Vendor the RAG engine overlay
description: Add the local knowledge-base RAG engine (Postgres + Qdrant + Redis + RAG API) as a compose overlay with a doctor health row.

name: Define the os_* Directus schema
description: Author the collections that power the delivery portal: organizations, contacts, projects, sprints, tasks, releases. Synthetic showcase schema.

name: Ship synthetic demo seeds (generic + analogelk)
description: Create profile seed data so a fresh install boots with a browsable, fully synthetic portal. No real secrets or client PII.

name: Wire the portal task board to the substrate
description: Connect the employee task board view to os_tasks with sprint filtering and a layout switcher. Pending the schema landing first.
